name.en: Amma Two Wheeler Scheme for Working Women

shortDescription.en: Amma Two Wheeler Scheme for Working Women — a financial assistance program by the Government of Tamil Nadu.
shortDescription.ta: திட்டம் பெண்கள் — தமிழ்நாடு அரசின் financial assistance திட்டம்.

benefits.en: Most of the working women in Tamil Nadu finds difficult to reached their work place on time.
The problem gets even worse when it is time to come back from the office.
benefits.ta: The problem gets even worse when it is time to come back from the office. திட்டம்

benefits.en: So, keeping this in mind Tamil Nadu Government launches Amma Two Wheeler Scheme for Working Women.
In this scheme, any working women who is willing to buy two wheeler will get subsidy from Tamil Nadu Government.
The amount of subsidy is Rs. 25,000/- or 50% of the cost of the vehicle, whichever is less.
benefits.ta: The amount of subsidy is Rs. 25,000/- or 50% of the cost of the vehicle, whichever is less. திட்டம்

benefits.en: Additional assistance of Rs. 6,250/- will be given to disable beneficiary.
The remaining amount will be borne by the beneficiary by herself.
benefits.ta: The remaining amount will be borne by the beneficiary by herself. திட்டம்

benefits.en: There is also a facility of loan through a bank or institutional loan for remaining amount.
benefits.ta: There is also a facility of loan through a bank or institutional loan for remaining amount. திட்டம்

benefits.en: Selected vehicle should be manufactured on or after 01.01.2018.
benefits.ta: Selected vehicle should be manufactured on or after 01.01.2018. திட்டம்

benefits.en: Only one women in a family is eligible to avail the benefit of the scheme.
The vehicles should only and only for the beneficiary's own use.
benefits.ta: The vehicles should only and only for the beneficiary's own use. திட்டம்

benefits.en: Vehicle should not be sold or transferred or gifted or lent to any other person for a minimum period of 3 years.
benefits.ta: Vehicle should not be sold or transferred or gifted or lent to any other person for a minimum period of 3 years. திட்டம்

eligibility.en: Women must meet the below mentioned criterias to receive the benefits of Amma Two Wheeler Scheme : -The women should be a resident of Tamil Nadu.Age should be between 18 to 40 years.Must Know Driving.Have Valid Two Wheeler License/Learner License.The annual income should not exceed to Rs. 2,50,000/-.Only single women beneficiary is eligible to avail the benefit in a family.Should have appeared for class 8th examination (Passed/Failed).Priority will be given to :-Women living in remote places or mountainous areas.Female Headed Families.Deserted Women.Destitute Widows.Disabled Women.Unmarried Women aged above 35 years.Schedule Caste/Schedule Tribe.Transgenders.
The women should be a resident of Tamil Nadu.
Age should be between 18 to 40 years.
eligibility.ta: Age should be between 18 to 40 years. திட்டம்

eligibility.en: Must Know Driving.
Have Valid Two Wheeler License/Learner License.
eligibility.ta: Have Valid Two Wheeler License/Learner License. திட்டம்

eligibility.en: The annual income should not exceed to Rs. 2,50,000/-.
eligibility.ta: The annual income should not exceed to Rs. 2,50,000/-. திட்டம்

eligibility.en: Only single women beneficiary is eligible to avail the benefit in a family.
Should have appeared for class 8th examination (Passed/Failed).
eligibility.ta: Should have appeared for class 8th examination (Passed/Failed). திட்டம்

eligibility.en: Priority will be given to :-Women living in remote places or mountainous areas.Female Headed Families.Deserted Women.Destitute Widows.Disabled Women.Unmarried Women aged above 35 years.Schedule Caste/Schedule Tribe.Transgenders.

process.en: CollectAmma Two Wheeler Scheme Application Form(Urban/Rural) from Block Offices, Urban Local Body Offices, and the Collectorates of the district free of cost.
Fill all the details in the Application Form correctly.
process.ta: Fill all the details in the Application Form correctly. திட்டம்

process.en: Attach all the required documents with theApplication Form.
process.ta: Attach all the required documents with theApplication Form. திட்டம்

process.en: Submit this duly filled in application form at the Block Office or Urban Local Bodies (ULBs) office.
process.ta: Submit this duly filled in application form at the Block Office or Urban Local Bodies (ULBs) office. திட்டம்

process.en: The applicant can also send their duly filled application through Speed/Registered Post.
process.ta: The applicant can also send their duly filled application through Speed/Registered Post. திட்டம்

process.en: A unique application number will be allotted to all applications.
process.ta: A unique application number will be allotted to all applications. திட்டம்

process.en: Acknowledgement receipt will be given to the applicant having a unique application number on it.
process.ta: Acknowledgement receipt will be given to the applicant having a unique application number on it. திட்டம்

process.en: Application will be scrutinized at different levels.

name.en: Moovalur Ramamirtham Ammaiyar Education Assurance Scheme

shortDescription.en: Moovalur Ramamirtham Ammaiyar Education Assurance Scheme — a education program by the Government of Tamil Nadu.
shortDescription.ta: கல்வி திட்டம் — தமிழ்நாடு அரசின் education திட்டம்.

benefits.en: The below mentioned benefits will be provided to eligible Girls Students under Moovalur Ramamirtham Ammaiyar Higher Education Assurance Scheme :-Financial Assistance of Rs. 1,000/- per Month will be provided to girls students till the completion of their course.
Financial Assistance of Rs. 1,000/- per Month will be provided to girls students till the completion of their course.
Under this scheme, only those girls are eligible who have completed their studies from class 6th to class 12th from a government school.
The girl who has completed her studies under Right to Education from class 6th to class 8th and after that from a government school from class 9th to class 12th are also eligible under this scheme.
A girl who takes benefit of any other government scheme is also eligible to get benefit under this scheme.
Girls studying in any Undergraduate Course, Professional Course, Paramedical Course, Diploma, ITI, or any other recognised course are eligible to take benefits under this scheme.
Girls who have completed class 6 to 12 from any private school, studying in open university or distance mode, studying in post graduate course are not eligible under this scheme.
An amount of Rs. 697.78 Core has been made for this scheme in the budget estimate for the year 2022-2023.
After applying, the list of eligible students will be released only after due scrutiny of the applications.
The financial assistance amount of the scheme will be given every month in the account of the girl.

process.en: Tamil Nadu Magalir Urimai Thogai Scheme was announced by the Government of Tamil Nadu in their 2023-2024 Budget.
Government of Tamil Nadu will going to launch Magalir Urimai Thogai Scheme on 15th of September 2023 on the birth anniversary of Perarignar Anna.
Now the Tamil Nadu Government releases the Official Guidelines of Tamil Nadu Magalir Urimai Thogai Scheme.
Registration of Women Beneficiary under this scheme will be done in the camps organised by Government.
Initially the Registration Camps of Magalir Urimai Thogai Scheme will be held at Ration/ Fair Price Shops.
Registration Forms of Magalir Urimai Thogai Scheme is available at those shops.
Volunteers present at shop will help the women beneficiary to fill the application form of Magalr Urimai Thogai Scheme.
Beneficiary can check theDistrict Wise Registration Camp Details of Magalir Urimai Thogai Scheme Here.
Visit the Registration Camp and Register themselves to get the benefit of financial assistance of Rs. 1,000/- per month under Tamil Nadu Government's Magalir Urimai Thogai Scheme.
Selected Women Beneficiary received a message on 18-09-2023 from Tamil Nadu Government.
But some Women did not get any SMS because their Application of Magalir Urimai Thogai Scheme is rejected.
But those women beneficiary didn't have to worry about it.
They can file an appeal within 30 days of receiving the SMS in front of Revenue Divisional Officer.
process.ta: They can file an appeal within 30 days of receiving the SMS in front of Revenue Divisional Officer. திட்டம்

process.en: Revenue Divisional Officer will make sure that the deficiency in the Applications should be removed and Women Beneficiary will get the benefit of Magalir Urimai Thogai Scheme of Tamil Nadu Government.
To file an appeal Women Beneficiary has to visit her nearest E Service Center.
Women Beneficiary can find her nearestE Service Center Here.
Women Beneficiary can also fileOnline Complaint for Tamil Nadu Magalir Urimai Thogai Scheme.

benefits.en: Eligible Women Beneficiaries of Tamil Nadu will get the below mentioned monetary assistance per month under Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam Scheme :-Financial Assistance of Rs. 1,000/- per Month.
Financial Assistance of Rs. 1,000/- per Month.

eligibility.en: The below mentioned eligibility conditions is set by Tamil Nadu Government in order to provide the benefits of Tamil Nadu Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam to eligible women beneficiaries :-Women Beneficiary should be a Permanent Resident of Tamil Nadu.Women Beneficiary's Age should be above 21 Years.Annual Family Income of Women Beneficiary should not be more than Rs. 2,50,000/- per year.Land Holding of Women Beneficiary Family should be :-Not More than 5 Acre of Wetland. OR,Not More than 10 Acre of Wetland.The Annual Electricity Consumption of Women Beneficiary Family should be below 3,600 Units.If Unmarried Single Women, Maidservant and Transgenders are Head of Household then they are also eligible to apply.

process.en: Eligible Beneficiary can Register themselves under Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam Scheme by visiting their area's nearest Fair Price Shop/ Ration Shop.
Initially the Registration of Women Beneficiary will be done at Ration Shop/ Fair Price Shop through Application Registration Forms.
Volunteers present at shops will help the women beneficiary to fill the Registration Form of Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam Scheme.
After filling it correctly, the Application Form of Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam Scheme will be submitted to officials present at Ration Shops.
Received Application Forms will then forward to Implementing Department.

process.en: Concerned Officials will scrutinised the Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam Scheme Application Form and documents.
After Verification, the monthly financial assistance of Rs. 1,000/- per month will be transferred in the bank account of women beneficiary from 15th September onwards.
The Registration Camps for Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam Scheme Registration will be held from 24-07-2023 to 16-08-2023.
Women Beneficiary can find the theirKalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam  District Camp Details Here.
On 18-09-2023, Government of Tamil Nadu sent an SMS on those Women Beneficiary Phone Number whose application of Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam Scheme is accepted.
But many women did not receive the message in their phone because there Application of Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam Scheme is rejected.
But they don't have to worry about it because they have a chance to file an appeal through E Service Center within 30 Days of Receiving the SMS.

name.en: Tamil Nadu Tamizh Pudhalvan Scheme

shortDescription.en: Tamil Nadu Tamizh Pudhalvan Scheme — a scholarship program by the Government of Tamil Nadu.
shortDescription.ta: திட்டம் தமிழ்நாடு — தமிழ்நாடு அரசின் scholarship திட்டம்.

benefits.en: The below mentioned benefits will be provided to all eligible students who are currently studying in college/ university and who completed their Class 6th to Class 12th education from government or government aided school under Tamiz Pudhalvan Scheme of Tamil Nadu :-Per Month Scholarship as financial assistance will be provided to eligible boy students.Each Boy Students will get monthly scholarship of Rs. 1,000/-.

Each Boy Students will get monthly scholarship of Rs. 1,000/-.

eligibility.en: Tamil Nadu Government sets the following eligibility criteria for Tamizh Pudhalvan Scheme to provide monthly scholarship of Rs. 1,000/- to all eligible students :-Only Boys Students are Eligible.Boy Student should be a Permanent Resident of Tamil Nadu.Boys should have completed their class 6th to class 12th education from Government or Government Aided Schools.Boys Students from Government Aided Tamil Medium Schools are also eligible.Boy Students should be currently in any Undergraduation, Diploma, Polytechnic or ITI course after completing class 12th.

process.en: The Tamil Nadu Government introduced the Free Laptop Scheme during the presentation of the 2025–2026 State Budget, aiming to strengthen digital learning among students across the state.
Through this initiative, the government seeks to support students in their academic journey by providing access to essential technological resources.
On 5 January 2026, Chief Minister Thiru M. K. Stalin officially inaugurated the first phase of the scheme, marking the beginning of laptop distribution to eligible students.
The government does not operate this scheme through any online application system.
Students cannot submit applications through a website or digital portal for this benefit.
Instead, the Tamil Nadu Government implements the scheme directly through colleges, universities, and other recognized educational institutions.
These institutions play a central role in identifying and coordinating beneficiaries.
process.ta: These institutions play a central role in identifying and coordinating beneficiaries. திட்டம்

process.en: Each college or university prepares a list of eligible students strictly according to the guidelines issued by the government.
The responsibility of shortlisting students lies with the respective educational institutions.
After preparing the list, institutional authorities verify the students' academic records, enrollment status, and eligibility details to ensure accuracy and compliance with the scheme norms.
The government then reviews the verified lists submitted by colleges and finalises the beneficiaries for laptop distribution.
process.ta: The government then reviews the verified lists submitted by colleges and finalises the beneficiaries for laptop distribution. திட்டம்

process.en: Once the selection process is complete, the concerned colleges or universities inform the selected students about the date, time, and location of laptop distribution.
Meanwhile, the state has also prepared a dedicatedPortal for the Free Laptop Scheme.
Beneficiary Students can go through it and check it regularly for updates.
For any support related to the Tamil Nadu Free Laptop Scheme, students can reach the helpline at 18005999000.

name.en: Tamil Nadu 200 Units Free Electricity Scheme

shortDescription.en: Tamil Nadu 200 Units Free Electricity Scheme — a scheme program by the Government of Tamil Nadu.
shortDescription.ta: இலவச திட்டம் தமிழ்நாடு — தமிழ்நாடு அரசின் scheme திட்டம்.

benefits.en: Eligible domestic consumers will receive 200 units of free electricity every two months.
Financial relief will be provided to households affected by rising electricity expenses.
benefits.ta: Financial relief will be provided to households affected by rising electricity expenses. திட்டம்

benefits.en: The existing 100 units of free electricity benefit will continue for consumers using more than 500 units bi-monthly.
The electricity subsidy amount will be adjusted directly in the electricity bills.
benefits.ta: The electricity subsidy amount will be adjusted directly in the electricity bills. திட்டம்

benefits.en: No separate application process is required for eligible consumers.
benefits.ta: No separate application process is required for eligible consumers. திட்டம்

benefits.en: Existing subsidy benefits for the handloom and powerloom sectors continue in the state.
benefits.ta: Existing subsidy benefits for the handloom and powerloom sectors continue in the state. திட்டம்

eligibility.en: Applicant must be a domestic electricity consumer in Tamil Nadu.
Household electricity consumption should remain within 500 units in a two-month billing cycle to receive 200 units free electricity benefit.
Consumers using above 500 units bi-monthly will continue to receive the existing 100 units free electricity benefit.
The electricity connection should be registered under the domestic category with TNPDCL.
eligibility.ta: The electricity connection should be registered under the domestic category with TNPDCL. திட்டம்

eligibility.en: Existing handloom and powerloom subsidy benefits will continue as per current government rules.

requiredDocuments.en: Beneficiaries are not required to submit any separate application form for the scheme.
Since the subsidy benefit will be automatically adjusted in the electricity bill, no mandatory document submission process has been announced by the Tamil Nadu government.
Eligible domestic consumers will automatically receive the subsidy benefit based on their electricity consumption and billing records.
requiredDocuments.ta: Eligible domestic consumers will automatically receive the subsidy benefit based on their electricity consumption and billing records. திட்டம்

requiredDocuments.en: However, if any eligible household is not receiving the scheme benefit, they may need to contact the Electricity Department or the TNPDCL office for verification.
In such cases, consumers may be asked to provide supporting documents such as:Latest electricity billElectricity consumer number or service connection detailsAadhaar CardAddress proofIdentity proof

requiredDocuments.ta: Electricity consumer number or service connection details திட்டம்

process.ta: The electricity subsidy benefit will be automatically adjusted in the consumer's electricity bill based on their bimonthly power consumption. திட்டம்

process.en: Domestic consumers using up to 500 units in two months will automatically receive a benefit of 200 units of free electricity.

Consumers should ensure that their electricity connection is registered under the domestic category with TNPDCL.

name.en: Tamil Nadu Vettri Payanam Thittam Scheme

shortDescription.ta: திட்டம் தமிழ்நாடு — தமிழ்நாடு அரசின் transport திட்டம்.

benefits.en: Complete Free Travel: Women travel without paying any bus fare across all government bus services in Tamil Nadu
Extended Route Access: Free travel applies to ordinary buses, express services, and long-distance routes without distance restrictions.
Monthly Savings: Working women and students can save substantial monthly transportation expenses (typically Rs 500-Rs 1500+, depending on commute patterns)
Enhanced Mobility: Women gain unrestricted access to employment centres, educational institutions, medical facilities, and market areas across districts.
No Documentation Hassle: Beneficiaries board buses directly without online registration or offline application procedures.
benefits.ta: No Documentation Hassle: Beneficiaries board buses directly without online registration or offline application procedures. திட்டம்

benefits.en: Fleet Improvement Promise: The government commits to increasing bus frequency and reducing wait times at bus stops.
benefits.ta: Fleet Improvement Promise: The government commits to increasing bus frequency and reducing wait times at bus stops. திட்டம்

benefits.en: Wider Geographic Coverage: Unlike the existing scheme, women can travel across the entire state—from remote rural areas to major urban centres and inter-district routes.

eligibility.en: The applicant should be a woman resident of Tamil Nadu.
The beneficiary may need to travel in the eligible government buses notified under the scheme.

name.en: Tamil Nadu Free Bus Pass Scheme for Students

shortDescription.en: Tamil Nadu Free Bus Pass Scheme for Students — a transport program by the Government of Tamil Nadu.
shortDescription.ta: இலவச திட்டம் மாணவர்கள் தமிழ்நாடு — தமிழ்நாடு அரசின் transport திட்டம்.

benefits.en: Free bus travel facility for eligible students.
Valid for travel between residence and educational institution.
Available for school, ITI, polytechnic, and college students.
Permitted on all days during the validity period.
benefits.ta: Permitted on all days during the validity period. திட்டம்

benefits.en: Can be used on Ordinary, Express, and Deluxe bus services.
benefits.ta: Can be used on Ordinary, Express, and Deluxe bus services. திட்டம்

benefits.en: Reduces transportation expenses for students and their families.
Promotes regular attendance and access to education.

eligibility.en: Students studying in Classes I to XII in Government-recognised schools.
Students enrolled in Government Arts and Science Colleges.
Students studying in Government Polytechnics.
Students enrolled in Government Industrial Training Institutes (ITIs).
The applicant must be studying in an eligible educational institution in Tamil Nadu.

requiredDocuments.en: Bonafide Certificate issued by the school or college.
requiredDocuments.ta: Bonafide Certificate issued by the school or college. திட்டம்

requiredDocuments.en: Duly filled Student Bus Pass Application Form.
requiredDocuments.ta: Duly filled Student Bus Pass Application Form. திட்டம்

process.en: Students should contact their respective school, college, ITI, or polytechnic institution to obtain theFree Bus Pass application form.
The application form may be obtained through the educational institution or from the concerned Transport Corporation website.
The student should carefully fill in all required details, including name, class/course, residential address, educational institution details, and the nearest boarding and destination bus stops.
The applicant must attach the required documents and recent passport-size photographs as prescribed by the institution.
process.ta: The applicant must attach the required documents and recent passport-size photographs as prescribed by the institution. திட்டம்

process.en: The school or college authorities will verify the student's enrollment details and certify the application before forwarding it to the Transport Department or the concerned State Transport Corporation.
process.ta: The school or college authorities will verify the student's enrollment details and certify the application before forwarding it to the Transport Department or the concerned State Transport Corporation. திட்டம்

process.en: Educational institutions are also required to prepare and submit student details in the prescribed digital format along with the physical applications for processing.

Under the online bus pass issuance system, officials from the Transport Corporation may visit schools, colleges, ITIs, and polytechnic institutions to capture student photographs and complete the pass generation process.
process.ta: Under the online bus pass issuance system, officials from the Transport Corporation may visit schools, colleges, ITIs, and polytechnic institutions to capture student photographs and complete the pass generation process. திட்டம்

process.en: The Transport Corporation verifies the submitted details and prepares the student bus passes.
process.ta: The Transport Corporation verifies the submitted details and prepares the student bus passes. திட்டம்

process.en: After printing and lamination, the completed bus passes are delivered to the respective educational institutions.
Students can collect their Free Bus Pass from their school, college, ITI, or polytechnic institution and use it for travel between their residence and educational institution.
Bus passes are generally issued between 15 June and 30 November each year, and the pass remains valid up to 30 April of the academic year.
process.ta: Bus passes are generally issued between 15 June and 30 November each year, and the pass remains valid up to 30 April of the academic year. திட்டம்
